summary: PR #642 submitted to leanprover/cslib. Branch pr3/temporal-syntax created from refactor/proposition-lukasiewicz with all 4 temporal syntax files (Formula.lean 582L, Context.lean 131L, BigConj.lean 52L, Subformulas.lean 218L). Added Kamp1968 and GabbayPnueliShelahStavi1980 BibTeX entries, updated citations to BibKey format, added 4 barrel imports to Cslib.lean. All CI checks passed locally.

artifacts.summary: Research report covering upstream state, PR #635 dependency, branch strategy, bib gaps, CI requirements
4-phase implementation plan: branch creation, references/citations, CI verification, PR submission
Implementation summary with plan deviations and CI verification results

deviations: Included all 4 syntax files (not just Formula.lean) per orchestrator task scope
Abbreviated Gabbay citation to 'et al.' to pass 100-char line limit
PR submitted against leanprover/cslib main (not refactor/proposition-lukasiewicz, which is not available on the upstream repo)
dependency_note: PR #642 depends on PR #635 (Connectives.lean). PR #635 must merge before PR #642 can be merged.
